notes: In v1, user selects event type + date/time first, then chooses a primary service. Once selected, primary service is locked for the session/draft and drives the subsequent customization UI.

primaryServices.label: DJ
primaryServices.description: Professional DJ/MC service; user customizes styles/services/add-ons and receives an estimate subject to vendor confirmation.

primaryServices.label: Karaoke
primaryServices.description: Karaoke as the primary experience; user selects karaoke services/equipment and add-ons with tiered estimate.

primaryServices.label: Photo Booth
primaryServices.description: Photo booth as the primary experience; user selects booth type(s), duration bundle(s), and timing per booth instance.
